uq-brisbane.name: University of Queensland
uq-brisbane.tagline: Sandstone spirit, riverside innovation, explore more
uq-brisbane.reasoning: This tagline captures UQ's historic campus vibe, scenic riverside location, and its reputation for cutting-edge research and diverse opportunities, appealing to adventurous students.

unimelb.name: University of Melbourne
unimelb.tagline: Brains meet baristas in Melbourne's cultural heart.
unimelb.reasoning: This tagline highlights the university's top-notch academic reputation alongside Melbourne's vibrant, coffee-loving cultural scene, creating a blend of intellect and lifestyle that's uniquely Melbourne.

jcu-townsville.name: James Cook University
jcu-townsville.tagline: Dive into discovery on the reef's edge
jcu-townsville.reasoning: This tagline captures JCU's unique proximity to the Great Barrier Reef, appealing to students interested in marine biology and environmental sciences with a sense of adventure and exploration.

griffith-gold-coast.name: Griffith University Gold Coast
griffith-gold-coast.reasoning: This tagline captures the essence of Griffith University Gold Coast’s location near iconic beaches, its academic rhythm with the trimester system, and its emphasis on innovation and entrepreneurship, all in a playful and memorable style.

unsw-sydney.name: UNSW Sydney
unsw-sydney.tagline: Code, create, conquer by the coast.
unsw-sydney.reasoning: This tagline encapsulates UNSW Sydney's strong emphasis on engineering and innovation (code, create), while highlighting its vibrant coastal location and ambitious student environment (conquer by the coast).
